summary: Verified navbar opacity/blur fix. Header is fully opaque cream rgb(246,244,235) with backdrop-filter:none, both before and after scrolling. No dark bleed-through from hero. All regressions pass (fixed position, nav links, 50px logo, mobile hamburger menu opens, mobile navbar also opaque).

bug_verification.screenshot_visual: Top 140px appears uniformly cream/off-white with no dark bleed-through from hero. Confirmed via screenshot after scrolling to y=400.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Navbar bug fully resolved. computed backgroundColor stays rgb(246,244,235) and backdropFilter 'none' on desktop and mobile, before and after scroll.
